caribbean.headline: Light Winds and Moderate Seas Across Caribbean Ports
caribbean.paragraph: Bimini is experiencing moderate conditions with northeast swells dominating at 3.3-foot wave heights and sustained winds around 18 knots. Rain chances peak near 68 percent, while Ocho Rios reports lighter winds near 10 knots with minimal impact on marine operations.

mediterranean.headline: Moderate Winds and High Waves Impact Haifa Port Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Haifa is experiencing moderate winds up to 19 knots with significant wave heights reaching 10.8 feet and a dominant west-northwest swell period of 8 seconds. Rain chances are elevated at 65 percent, creating challenging conditions for marine operations in the eastern Mediterranean.
